name: Flashcard Quiz
description: Create and study flashcard decks on any subject. Use this when a student wants to study, review, memorize, or practice any topic. The AI generates flashcards, tracks correct/incorrect answers, and adapts difficulty.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: create_deck
tools.description: Create a new flashcard deck on a topic. Use when the student wants to study or review a subject.

topic.description: The subject or topic (e.g., 'Spanish vocabulary', 'US State capitals', 'photosynthesis')

cards.description: JSON array of cards, each with 'front' and 'back' fields. E.g., [{"front":"Hola","back":"Hello"},{"front":"Gracias","back":"Thank you"}]

tools.name: get_study_progress
tools.description: Get the student's current study progress — how many cards reviewed, correct/incorrect, and which cards need more practice.
